sections.a_eyebrow: Data Intensive · Tables · Professional · Balanced · Clean UI
sections.a_description: The distinctive visual language of Table-Heavy UI — combining data intensive, tables, professional elements to create interfaces that are immediately recognizable and purposefully designed. Every color, font choice, and spacing decision works together to evoke the specific mood and cultural context that defines this aesthetic, from the primary accent color to the carefully chosen typography.

This style finds its natural home across websites and applications that value data intensive and tables design principles. You'll see it on creative portfolios, brand microsites, specialized platforms, and digital experiences where the visual language itself communicates as powerfully as the content — proving that the right aesthetic choice can transform a standard layout into a memorable experience.

a_image_cover.alt: Table-Heavy UI style use case illustration
Table-Heavy UI style use case illustration
Table-Heavy UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive visual aesthetic of Table-Heavy UI — a design approach that creates unique, memorable interfaces. Background: light (#ffffff). The .inner panel has a clean background with subtle border treatment and appropriate border-radius. Colors: #475569 as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. #0f172a for headings, #64748b for body text. The aesthetic captures the essence of table-heavy ui through careful color choices, spacing, and visual weight. Set in Inter — chosen for its visual character that complements this design style. Heading at weight 600-700, 24-28px, line-height 1.2-1.3. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2-3px letter-spacing, color #475569. Body at weight 400, 14-15px, line-height 1.6-1.7, color #64748b. Buttons: primary — #475569 background with contrasting text. Secondary: transparent with #475569 border. Alternatives: system-ui (universal fallback), sans-serif stack.
